categories.name: Automation
categories.description: 浏览器自动化、网页抓取

skills.name: browser-automation
skills.description: Automate web browser interactions using natural language via CLI commands. Use when the user asks to browse websites, navigate web pages, extract data from websites, take screenshots, fill forms, click buttons, or interact with web applications.

skills.name: composio
skills.description: Use 1000+ external apps via Composio - either directly through the CLI or by building AI agents and apps with the SDK

skills.name: exa-web-search-free
skills.description: Free AI search via Exa MCP. ⚠️ 必须使用mcporter调用，禁止使用web_search工具！

skills.name: graphify
skills.description: 从红龙产品目录、客户对话、市场调研中构建知识图谱，发现隐藏关联、交叉销售机会和竞争洞察。

skills.name: playwright
skills.description: Browser automation via Playwright MCP. Navigate websites, click elements, fill forms, take screenshots, extract data, and debug real browser workflows. Use when (1) you need a real browser, not static fetch; (2) the task involves Playwright MCP, browser tools, Playwright tests, scripts, or JS-rendered pages; (3) the user wants navigation, forms, screenshots, PDFs, downloads, or browser-driven extraction turned into a reliable outcome.

skills.name: web-content-fetcher
skills.description: 网页内容获取工具 | 当常规爬虫被过滤时，使用替代服务获取网页内容。支持：1) r.jina.ai - 最稳定 2) markdown.new - Cloudflare 专用 3) defuddle.md - 备用方案。触发词：获取网页内容、网页转markdown、内容抓取、fetch webpage、bypass cloudflare
